items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 24 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「Into the Omniverse: Three Workflows for Improving Vision AI Agent Accuracy With Synthetic Data and Fine-Tuning」、「How Businesses Are Building Specialized AI They Can Trust」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。
